# VoltAgent

> VoltAgent is an open-source TypeScript framework for building, orchestrating, and observing sophisticated AI agents. It provides modular components (Agents, Tools, Memory, RAG, Voice, Sub-agents, Workflows) with first-class observability through the VoltOps Platform.

VoltAgent is provider-agnostic and integrates with the Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, and local models via Ollama. See `llms-full.txt` for the comprehensive inline guide.

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://voltagent.dev/docs/getting-started/quick-start): create-voltagent-app CLI and manual setup
- [Project README](https://github.com/VoltAgent/voltagent/blob/main/README.md): high-level project overview

## Agents

- [Agents Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/overview): the Agent class, lifecycle, and internal managers
- [Tools](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/tools): createTool with Zod schemas
- [Sub-agents](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/sub-agents): supervisor + delegate_task pattern
- [Hooks](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/hooks): lifecycle interception
- [Voice](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/voice): TTS and STT
- [MCP Client](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/mcp/mcp): connect agents to MCP servers
- [MCP Server](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/mcp/mcp-server): expose agents as MCP
- [Dynamic Agents](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/dynamic-agents): runtime configuration
- [A2A Protocol](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/a2a/a2a-server): agent-to-agent communication
- [Multi-Modal](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/multi-modal): images, audio, media
- [Context](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/context): runtime context propagation
- [Cancellation](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/cancellation): AbortSignal handling

## Memory

- [Memory Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/overview): adapters and lifecycle
- [LibSQL](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/libsql): SQLite/Turso storage
- [PostgreSQL](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/postgres): production Postgres adapter
- [Supabase](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/supabase): Supabase + RLS
- [Working Memory](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/working-memory): schema-validated context
- [Semantic Search](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/semantic-search): vector embeddings
- [Managed Memory](https://voltagent.dev/docs/agents/memory/managed-memory): hosted via VoltOps

## Workflows

- [Workflows Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/workflows/overview): multi-step AI pipelines
- [Steps](https://voltagent.dev/docs/workflows/steps): andThen, andAgent, andWhen, andAll, andRace, andTap
- [Suspend & Resume](https://voltagent.dev/docs/workflows/suspend-resume): human-in-the-loop pause
- [Workflow Hooks](https://voltagent.dev/docs/workflows/hooks): lifecycle events
- [Execute API](https://voltagent.dev/docs/workflows/execute-api): REST workflow execution

## RAG

- [RAG Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/overview): retrieval-augmented generation
- [Custom Retrievers](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/custom-retrievers): extend BaseRetriever
- [Chroma](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/chroma), [Pinecone](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/pinecone), [Qdrant](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/qdrant): vector DBs
- [Chunkers](https://voltagent.dev/docs/rag/chunkers/overview): semantic, neural, recursive, markdown, code, and more

## Guardrails

- [Guardrails Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/guardrails/overview): input/output validation
- [Built-in Guardrails](https://voltagent.dev/docs/guardrails/built-in): PII, profanity, length

## Models & Providers

- [Models Overview](https://voltagent.dev/models-docs/overview): provider registry
- [Providers](https://voltagent.dev/models-docs/providers): OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, Ollama, and more

## Observability

- [Observability Overview](https://voltagent.dev/observability-docs/overview): tracing and monitoring
- [Developer Console](https://voltagent.dev/observability-docs/developer-console): VoltOps Platform UI
- [Langfuse](https://voltagent.dev/observability-docs/langfuse): analytics integration
- [Logging](https://voltagent.dev/observability-docs/logging): structured logging

## Evaluation

- [Evals Overview](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/overview): agent quality measurement
- [Offline Evaluations](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/offline-evaluations): dataset-based
- [Live Evaluations](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/live-evaluations): production monitoring
- [Datasets](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/datasets), [Experiments](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/experiments), [Prebuilt Scorers](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/prebuilt-scorers), [Custom Scorers](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/building-custom-scorers)
- [CLI Reference](https://voltagent.dev/evaluation-docs/cli-reference)

## API & Server

- [API Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/api/overview): REST endpoints
- [API Reference](https://voltagent.dev/docs/api/api-reference): full schemas
- [Authentication](https://voltagent.dev/docs/api/authentication)
- [Custom Endpoints](https://voltagent.dev/docs/api/custom-endpoints): extend the server

## UI Integrations

- [UI Overview](https://voltagent.dev/docs/ui/overview): frontend integrations
- [AI SDK](https://voltagent.dev/docs/ui/ai-sdk-integration): Vercel AI SDK primitives
- [CopilotKit](https://voltagent.dev/docs/ui/copilotkit): React components
- [Assistant UI](https://voltagent.dev/docs/ui/assistant-ui): chat UI starter

## Deployment

- [Deployment Overview](https://voltagent.dev/deployment-docs/overview)
- [Cloudflare Workers](https://voltagent.dev/deployment-docs/cloudflare-workers)
- [Netlify Functions](https://voltagent.dev/deployment-docs/netlify-functions)
- [VoltOps](https://voltagent.dev/deployment-docs/voltops)

## Actions & Triggers

- [Overview](https://voltagent.dev/actions-triggers-docs/overview): managed integrations triggered from agents/workflows
- Actions: Slack, Discord, Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Airtable, Postgres
- [Triggers](https://voltagent.dev/actions-triggers-docs/triggers): event-based agent invocation

## Prompt Engineering

- [Overview](https://voltagent.dev/prompt-engineering-docs/overview): prompt management
- [Creating Prompts](https://voltagent.dev/prompt-engineering-docs/creating-prompts)
- [Analytics](https://voltagent.dev/prompt-engineering-docs/analytics)
- [Import/Export](https://voltagent.dev/prompt-engineering-docs/import-export)

## Full Inline Guide

- [llms-full.txt](https://voltagent.dev/llms-full.txt): comprehensive self-contained guide with architecture, code examples, and design rationale

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/VoltAgent/voltagent): source code
- [Recipes & Guides](https://voltagent.dev/recipes-and-guides): practical examples
- [Blog](https://voltagent.dev/blog): announcements and tutorials
- [Contributing](https://voltagent.dev/docs/community/contributing): how to contribute
